author: Aymeric Giraudet
subject: feat(hooks): add `searchAsYouType` option to <SearchBox> (algolia/react-instantsearch#3585)
body:
* feat(hooks): add `searchAsYouType` option to <SearchBox>

* feat(search-box): refine on submit only if `searchAsYouType` is false

* feat(search-box): refine when searchAsYouType is false even if onSubmit is provided

* docs(hooks): avoid redundant js-doc type annotation

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>
